ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_part_no" TEXT /* Manufacturer's part number for the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "quantity_per_board" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component required per board */,
  "seller_stock_no" TEXT /* Seller's stock number for the component */,
  "legend" TEXT /* Legend or identifier for the component */,
  "uom" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the component */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time for the component */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the component */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity for the component */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the component */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for the component */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the component */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Last date the component was purchased */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Last date the component was sold */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the component is stored */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component on hand */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Recommended reorder level for the component */,
  "reserved_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component reserved for upcoming production */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was updated */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for the component at this location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the order is placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used in production */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where production occurred */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in production */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was used in production */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for the production run */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the production */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine used for production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being checked */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the check occurred */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control check was performed */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (pass/fail) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the quality check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the quality check */,
  "test_equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test equipment used for the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, production supervisor, quality control analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_replacements" (
  "replacement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replacement record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being replaced */,
  "replacement_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replacement component */,
  "reason_for_replacement" TEXT /* Reason why the component is being replaced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replacement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_replacements_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_replacements_replacement_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("replacement_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date for the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_lead_times" (
  "lead_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead time record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the component from the supplier */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the lead time was updated */,
  "effective_from" TEXT /* Date from which the lead time is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_lead_times_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_lead_times_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "quantity_forecasted" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component forecasted */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_demand_forecasts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_demand_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
